sentences.target: Wir müssen die Kisten rauf- und runtertragen.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ diː ˈkɪstn̩ ʁaʊf ʊnt ˈʁʊntɐˌtʁaːɡn̩/

translations.de: Wir müssen die Kisten rauf- und runtertragen.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ̯ ˈmʏsn̩ diː ˈkɪstn̩ ʁaʊf ʊnt ˈʁʊntɐˌtʁaːɡn̩/
translations.en: We have to carry the boxes up and down.
translations.es: Tenemos que subir y bajar las cajas.
translations.fr: On doit monter et descendre les cartons.
translations.it: Dobbiamo portare le scatole su e giù.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们得把箱子搬上搬下。
translations.yue: 我哋要將啲箱搬上搬落。
translations.ru: Нам нужно носить коробки вверх и вниз.
translations.pt: Temos que levar as caixas para cima e para baixo.
translations.he: אנחנו צריכים לסחוב את הארגזים למעלה ולמטה.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi phải khiêng các thùng lên xuống.
translations.ar: علينا أن نحمل الصناديق صعودًا وهبوطًا.
translations.nl: We moeten de dozen op en neer dragen.
translations.uk: Нам потрібно носити коробки вгору й вниз.
translations.hu: Fel és le kell cipelnünk a dobozokat.
translations.hi: हमें बक्से ऊपर-नीचे उठाकर ले जाने हैं.
translations.pl: Musimy nosić pudła w górę i w dół.
translations.el: Πρέπει να κουβαλήσουμε τα κουτιά πάνω και κάτω.
translations.nb: Vi må bære eskene opp og ned.
translations.id: Kita harus membawa kotak-kotak itu naik turun.
translations.sv: Vi måste bära lådorna upp och ner.
translations.ro: Trebuie să cărăm cutiile sus și jos.
translations.cs: Musíme nosit krabice nahoru a dolů.
translations.da: Vi skal bære kasserne op og ned.
translations.fi: Meidän pitää kantaa laatikot ylös ja alas.
translations.ja: 箱を上へ下へ運ばないといけない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1pl), governs a bare infinitive verb phrase; expresses obligation.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of the direct object 'Kisten'.
Common noun, plural, accusative; direct object of the infinitive verb (applies to both coordinated actions).
Colloquial directional adverb ('up'); first conjunct in an elliptical coordination ('rauf' vs. 'runtertragen'), modifying the implied carrying action upward.
Coordinating conjunction linking two directional actions.
Separable particle verb (runter + tragen), bare infinitive complement of 'müssen'; denotes carrying downward.

translations.en: I want to run up and down.
translations.fr: Je veux monter et descendre en courant.
translations.ru: Я хочу бегать вверх и вниз.
translations.pt: Quero correr para cima e para baixo.
translations.nl: Ik wil op en neer rennen.
translations.uk: Я хочу бігати вгору й вниз.
translations.pl: Chcę biegać w górę i w dół.
translations.nb: Jeg vil løpe opp og ned.
translations.sv: Jag vill springa upp och ner.
translations.ro: Vreau să alerg în sus și în jos.
translations.da: Jeg vil løbe op og ned.
translations.ja: 階段を上り下りして走りたい。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular, nominative; subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 1sg), selecting a bare infinitive; expresses volition.
Directional adverb ('up'); first conjunct in an elliptical coordination with the full verb in the second conjunct.
Coordinating conjunction linking two directional actions.
Separable particle verb (runter + laufen), bare infinitive complement of 'will'; denotes running downward.

sentences.target: Der Aufzug kann rauf- und runterfahren.

translations.de: Der Aufzug kann rauf- und runterfahren.
translations.en: The elevator can go up and down.
translations.es: El ascensor puede subir y bajar.
translations.ru: Лифт может ездить вверх и вниз.
translations.pt: O elevador pode subir e descer.
translations.vi: Thang máy có thể đi lên đi xuống.
translations.nl: De lift kan op en neer gaan.
translations.uk: Ліфт може їздити вгору й вниз.
translations.hu: A lift fel és le tud menni.
translations.pl: Winda może jeździć w górę i w dół.
translations.el: Το ασανσέρ μπορεί να ανεβαίνει και να κατεβαίνει.
translations.nb: Heisen kan gå oпп og ned.
translations.sv: Hissen kan åka upp och ner.
translations.ro: Liftul poate merge în sus și în jos.
translations.cs: Výtah může jezdit nahoru a dolů.
translations.da: Elevatoren kan køre op og ned.
translations.fi: Hissi voi kulkea ylös ja alas.
translations.ja: エレベーターは上にも下にも行ける。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular; determiner of the subject 'Aufzug'.
Common noun, masculine; grammatical subject of the clause.
Modal auxiliary (present, 3sg), selects a bare infinitive; expresses ability/possibility.
Directional adverb ('up'); first conjunct in an elliptical coordination with the full infinitive in the second conjunct.
Coordinating conjunction linking two directional actions.
Separable particle verb (runter + fahren), bare infinitive complement of 'kann'; denotes moving/going downward (by vehicle/device).

sentences.target: Sie lassen die Kinder rauf- und runterklettern.
sentences.reading: /ziː ˈlasn̩ diː ˈkɪndɐ ʁaʊf ʊnt ˈʁʊntɐˌklɛtɐn/

translations.de: Sie lassen die Kinder rauf- und runterklettern.
translations.ipa: /ziː ˈlasn̩ diː ˈkɪndɐ ʁaʊf ʊnt ˈʁʊntɐˌklɛtɐn/
translations.en: They let the kids climb up and down.
translations.es: Dejan que los niños suban y bajen.
translations.fr: Ils laissent les enfants monter et descendre.
translations.it: Lasciano che i bambini salgano e scendano.
translations.yue: 佢哋畀啲小朋友爬上爬落。
translations.ru: Они позволяют детям лазать вверх и вниз.
translations.pt: Eles deixam as crianças subir e descer.
translations.he: הם נותנים לילדים לטפס למעלה ולמטה.
translations.tr: Çocukların yukarı aşağı tırmanmasına izin veriyorlar.
translations.vi: Họ cho bọn trẻ leo lên leo xuống.
translations.ar: إنهم يسمحون للأطفال بالتسلق صعودًا وهبوطًا.
translations.nl: Ze laten de kinderen op en neer klimmen.
translations.uk: Вони дозволяють дітям лазити вгору й вниз.
translations.hu: Hagyják, hogy a gyerekek fel-le másszanak.
translations.hi: वे बच्चों को ऊपर-नीचे चढ़ने देते हैं.
translations.pl: Pozwalają dzieciom wspinać się w górę i w dół.
translations.el: Αφήνουν τα παιδιά να σκαρφαλώνουν πάνω κάτω.
translations.nb: De lar barna klatre opp og ned.
translations.id: Mereka membiarkan anak-anak memanjat naik turun.
translations.sv: De låter barnen klättra upp och ner.
translations.ro: Îi lasă pe copii să se cațere în sus și în jos.
translations.cs: Nechávají děti lézt nahoru a dolů.
translations.da: De lader børnene klatre op og ned.
translations.fi: He antavat lasten kiipeillä ylös ja alas.
translations.ja: 子どもたちに上り下りさせている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person plural, nominative; subject of the clause (capitalization due to sentence-initial position).
Causative verb (present, 3pl), finite; takes an accusative object and a bare infinitive complement indicating the caused action.
Definite article, accusative plural; determiner of 'Kinder' as the object of 'lassen'.
Common noun, plural, accusative; object of 'lassen' and logical subject of the infinitive action.
Directional adverb ('up'); first conjunct in an elliptical coordination with the full infinitive in the second conjunct.
Coordinating conjunction linking two directional actions.
Separable particle verb (runter + klettern), bare infinitive complement of 'lassen'; denotes climbing downward.
